description: V6 contract for LanguageModelMiddleware system and built-in middleware implementations

cases.description: wrapLanguageModel preserves provider, modelId, and specificationVersion from inner model
Multiple middleware applied left-to-right; first middleware is outermost
extractReasoningMiddleware strips <think>...</think> from text; adds ReasoningPart to content
extractReasoningMiddleware converts <think>...</think> text deltas to ReasoningDelta stream parts
extractJsonMiddleware strips ```json ... ``` code fences from text output
simulateStreamingMiddleware calls doGenerate and fans out result as stream parts
defaultSettingsMiddleware applies temperature/maxOutputTokens defaults when not set at call time
Call-time values take precedence over defaultSettingsMiddleware defaults
addToolInputExamplesMiddleware appends Examples section to tool description
